<p align="center">
Thoughts resolve and words come to a slow...
<br/>
Your eyes open, slightly confused. Were you talking to yourself? Or was that Ducky...
</p>

<img height="360px" alt="Adventurer holding the Bubbles of Clarity in the air." src="../images/adventurer-bubbles-of-clarity.png" />

<img height="360px" alt="You are wiser than you know. Many heads are not always better than one. Wait... that sounds off... The ~Bubbles of Clarity~ are yours. Let them remind you that a good bath is the best (for solving problems)." src="../images/bubbles-of-clarity-reward.png"/>
